description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex with multiple interconnected structures, featuring a mix of flat and gable roofs. The property is surrounded by landscaped green lawns, numerous trees, and palm trees, with paved driveways and walkways leading to the main entrances. The house includes several outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool, patios, and garden areas, as well as a spacious garage and parking area. The exterior is predominantly finished in light colors, with some darker roof sections and accent walls. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large glass panels providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a prominent driveway, a covered porch, and decorative columns.
description: A sprawling modern house complex with multiple roof types, landscaped grounds, a pool, and a prominent entryway with a covered porch and columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, entryway with columns, and a broad lawn with trees and landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patios, and garden areas, with palm trees lining the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, additional green spaces, and the arrangement of interconnected house sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, more palm trees, and a clear view of the various rooflines and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide driveway, covered porch, decorative columns, and landscaped approach
